# Individual Contributor License Agreement (CLA)

Thank you for your interest in contributing! To protect the project, our users, and you as a contributor, we require that all contributors sign this Contributor License Agreement. 

By replying to the PR thread with the required signature phrase, you agree to the following terms:

**1. Grant of Copyright License.** You grant to the Project Maintainer a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable copyright license to reproduce, prepare derivative works of, publicly display, publicly perform, sublicense, and distribute Your Contributions and such derivative works.

**2. Grant of Patent License.**
You grant to the Project Maintainer and to recipients of software distributed by the Project Maintainer a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, no-charge, royalty-free, irrevocable patent license to make, have made, use, offer to sell, sell, import, and otherwise transfer the Work.

**3. You Keep Ownership.**
You retain ownership of the copyright in Your Contributions and have the same rights to use or license Your Contributions as you would have had without entering into this Agreement.

**4. Representation.**
You represent that You are legally entitled to grant the above licenses and that Your Contributions are your original creations.

**5. Disclaimer.**
Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, You provide Your Contributions on an "AS IS" BASIS, WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND.
